request: On-call engineer oncall@mycompany.com needs break-glass ability to impersonate the database-admin service account db-admin@ops-prod.iam.gserviceaccount.com for incident response. Access must expire 4 hours from now.

condition.title: 4-hour break-glass window, pinned to db-admin SA
condition.description: Allows minting tokens only for the specific db-admin service account and only for the next 4 hours.

rationale.reason: mint a short-lived token for the database-admin SA (pinned via CEL)

warnings: HIGH_RISK_ROLE: roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator grants the ability to act as a service account (Principle 2). Restricted here via resource.name CEL pinning.
BREAK_GLASS: This is elevated temporary access. File an incident ticket before applying and review audit logs after the 4-hour window closes (Principle 5).
alternatives: If the incident is recurring, codify the break-glass role as a custom role with only the minimum permissions needed
Prefer roles/iam.workloadIdentityUser if you can use workload identity federation instead
